turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hi there ! do you watch got ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i do ! i am only on season 3 so far though .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: you will be blown away by the ending ! i love that show .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i really like it so far . i enjoy writing in my spare time .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: cool hobby . i enjoy winter . i read a lot when it is cold .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i train horses as a career , so i wish the cold would stay away .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i cannot ride horses . being that high off the ground is terrifying .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: my folks don't like it . i dislike my parents , but adore my job .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: parents can be a bummer . you live with them ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: currently yes , i wish i knew where my place was in the world .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i really only can offer advice on colder parts of the country . sorry .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: that is ok , the snow can be enjoyable sometimes . i like christmas especially .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: christmas is great . do you spend it at home with your parents ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: usually i do , once i went to texas with a friend . how about you ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: i'm from texas . where did you go ? i'm from el paso .
